prestazioni: Engine swap to a **VW EA111 1.8T (CDAB) 20v turbo** (160 HP stock, tuned to 280 HP with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbo**, **Bosch 0280158101 60lb/hr injectors**, and **APR Stage 2+ ECU software** with 22 PSI boost on **98 RON fuel**)

Full **034 Motorsport billet aluminum motor mounts** and **Neuspeed torque arm insert** to handle increased power, paired with a **South Bend Clutch Stage 2+ clutch kit** for the **MQB-based 02Q 6-speed manual transmission** (swapped from a VW Polo GTI)

Custom **3-inch turbo-back exhaust system** with **Milltek Sport 76mm titanium tips**, **Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converter**, and **Scorpion 304 stainless steel downpipe** for optimal spool and flow
estetica: **Rieger Tuning RS-style front bumper** (Fox-specific, no cutting required) with **Hella 55W Bi-Xenon projectors** and **Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs**
**OMP Corsica carbon fiber side skirts** and **Volkswagen Motorsport rear diffuser** (OEM VW part #5K0071503B) with **Megan Racing adjustable rear spoiler** (Fox-specific mounting points)

**BBS CH-R 17x8 ET35 wheels** in **Gunmetal** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (215/40/17)** and **H&R Sport Springs (30mm drop)** for aggressive stance, paired with **KW Variant 3 coilovers** for track use
